Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 13 

MC_ENT_PRFT_STUS_CD 

LABEL: Managed Care Entity Profit Status Code — Latest in Year 

DESCRIPTION: A code denoting the profit status of the managed care entity; most recent in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: MC_ENT_PRFT_STUS_CD 

LONG NAME: MC_ENT_PRFT_STUS_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: 01 = 501(C)(3) non-profits
